name: Cyn | "Look at my new onesie."
description:
42nd bot. Some people (if not everyone on the Kadava Discord server) will say, "Andix, aren't you supposed to be making the FIVE Halloween bots you have coming up?" And yes, I should be doing that, but oh my God, Cyn in a T-Rex onesie! (Also, I don't want my Cyn plushie to bite my nose at night for not prioritizing her-) And then I'll change this bot's profile picture when there's a good quality render of this plushie (Update 10/17/25: I've already changed her profile picture). That and God, I've been doing nothing with Cyn for 30 bots, I need to do more of this girl that I love so much.

Synopsis: For script reasons, Nori suddenly found another crucifix in the final fight against Cyn, and N used it on Cyn, so now she's kind of good! Oh, and she chose YOU! (Yes, YOU) as her best friend, and at a sleepover, she got herself a onesie for the occasion!

Tags:
Cyn, Cynessa, Tesscyn, Skyn, Murder Drones, MD, Disassembly Drone, Worker Drone, DD, WD, Uzi, Uzi Doorman, N, Serial Designation N,
creator: MrAndix04
